title: TOPDON AL400-A OBD2 Code Reader, 10 OBD2 Functions, Check Engine Light/Smog Emission Test / O2 Sensor Test/EVAP, Free Lifetime Update
features: 10+ OBD2 FUNCTIONS: this scanner provides all OBD2 functions for vehicles compatible with OBD/EOBD/CAN (Controller Area Network) protocol. The most commonly used OBD features include reading and erasing DTCs, I/M readiness, graphic data stream, freeze frame, O2 sensor test, on-board monitor test, EVAP test, and vehicle information
ONE-CLICK SMOG CHECKER: I/M readiness button checks the exhaust fumes to help automobiles pass emissions tests with one click

FREE SOFTWARE UPDATE: this code reader can be upgraded for free, simply connect the device to a computer and install the updates through TOPDON's website. Scanners with similar features usually require yearly subscriptions
EASY TO USE: plug the connector into the 16-pin DLC, turn on the ignition, and the scanner will automatically connect to the vehicle, displaying the main menu for easy navigation
MULTI-LANGUAGE: both the menu and DTC definitions are available in 7 languages English, French, German, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Japanese.

WIDE COMPATIBILITY: this OBD2 code reader works on most US-based cars since 1996, EU-based cars after 2000, and Asian-based cars after 2008. Our hotline provides 24-hour technical support for prompt problem resolution at support@topdon.com
description: From the manufacturer A Quality Diagnostic OBD2 Scanner If you want a high-quality OBD2 scanner equivalent to dealer-level diagnostic tools, TOPDON’s ArtiLink 400 is your ideal choice. More Compatibility: This is an essential diagnostic scanner made to solve most emission-related OBD2 issues for modern cars (American vehicles after 1996, European vehicles after 2003, and Asian vehicles after 2008). It is compatible with KWP2000, ISO9141, J1850 VPW, J1850 PWM, and CAN Protocols. Full OBD2 Test Capabilities: The AL400 Reads & Clears both generic and manufacturer-specific check engine light codes and reset monitor; Offers I/M readiness to test misfire, fuel system, and other components; Displays all data stream in graphics for easy analysis; Freezes frame data to check the snapshot of running status when an error occurs, and much more. Free Updates: the ArtiLink400 offers Lifetime Diagnostic Software Updates. This scan tool will save you money. DTC Lookup Library: Designed for Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs) detailed explanations. 3 Color LED Indicators: The ArtiLink 400 indicators report OBD2 test results immediately, allowing you to evaluate the vehicle’s health at a glance. Solid Design: Its rugged plastic housing can absorb the impact and prevent damage to the tool, saving you money in the long run and providing extra durability. User-Oriented: The AL400 includes well-laid-out buttons for an effortless operation, even when wearing gloves. Multilingual Menu: Have all the information you need in English, French, Spanish, German, Italian, Portuguese, and Japanese. Full Modes of OBDII Test TOPDON’s ArtiLink400 can quickly tell you the exact cause behind the check engine warning light. This fully-featured obd2 code reader can help solve emission issues and help pass the smog test for OBD2/CAN vehicles (American vehicles after 1996, European vehicles after 2003, and Asian vehicles after 2008). 1. Reads Fault Codes associated with Check Engine Light on vehicle dashboards. 2. Clears Fault Codes, being able to turn off Check Engine Light after servicing and repairing. 3. Views Dynamic Live Data to show how the car is performing. 4. Displays I/M Readiness status to identify if the car is ready for the emissions test. 5. Shows Freeze Frame data to see what happened when the fault code was set. 6. Its O2 Sensor Test checks fuel efficiency and emission status. 7. Performs EVAP Test for fuel tank system (carbon canister) test. 8. Access to on-board diagnostic monitoring test results to determine if some specific components or the monitors are normal. 9. Retrieves vehicle information (VIN, CID, and CVN) to track the car’s details and historical records. 10. Offers a built-in DTC lookup library for generic (P0, P2, P3, and U0) and manufacturer-specific (P1, P3, and U1) codes. This function shows the definition of the DTC immediately, so you don’t have to search online. 3-Color LED Indicators This diagnostic OBD2 code reader also has an “ideal early warning system” to help you find possible dangers before they occur, with red, yellow, and green LED lights that indicate the health status at a glance. The RED light alerts you when fault codes are found; the YELLOW shows up when there is a pending code; the GREEN light appears when there are no fault codes. Graphic Data Stream Another highlight of this scan tool is the real-time error detection, which is presented in graphics and can be merged for easy and intuitive car diagnosis. You’ll be quickly notified of a problem as soon as it appears to help you pinpoint any underlying issues and get your vehicle back on the road in no time. DTC Lookup Library This diagnostic tool will expand your information on any generic or manufacturer-specific code for better interpretation and analysis. You don’t have to search for the code online to see what it means with this function. It’s all in black and white on your portable device! 2.4” TFT Color Screen This obd2 scanner comes with a 2.4” color display that is bright enough for you to see the data in any light condition easily. The icons are simple to understand, and the menu is easy to operate. The ArtiLink 400 is the ideal tool for beginners! All you need to do is plug it into the OBD2 port. Lifetime Updates TOPDON’s AL400 is constantly updated to run smoothly and offer more vehicle compatibility. This tool doesn’t require subscription. With the ArtiLink 400, you get a diagnostic tool that can be updated through its lifetime. Quality Backup TOPDON provides 12 months extended quality backup. TOPDON is always ready to assist you to solve your problems. TOPDON AL300, OBD2 Scanner Code Reader, car Auto Diagnostic Tool with Full OB... specifications_table.Special Features: ‎5 Button Design&2.4 Inch Color Display, Free update via Computer, Read freeze frame to provide more information to solve the fault code, Read vehicle information, such as VIN/CID/CVN, car diagnostic scanner for all cars compatible with OBD/EOBD/CAN protocol, namely US vehicles after 1996, EU vehicles after 2003 and Asian vehicles after 2008, check the operation of misfire monitor, O2 sensor and Evap System for vehicles compatible with OBDII protocol, engine fault code reader for bmw vw ford vauxhall tiguan audi land rover mercedes jaguar jeep mazda mini cooper nissan renault volvo citroen peugeot toyota skoda, quickly read and clear generic codes (P0, P2, P3, and U0) and manufacturer code(P1,P3, U1)
